what: clean raw data from a entomology study — clean_raw_data
title: clean raw data from a entomology study — clean_raw_data
text: function creates data.frame contains data changes type data. data assumed previously loaded using function "load_raw_data" .txt file associated entomology study conducted platform "Vigilancia Entomológica y Control Integral del Vector". function aims generate new data.frame suitable analysis manipulation. also saves data data.frame .csv file

title: clean raw data from a entomology study — clean_raw_data
code: clean_raw_data(   df,   path_out = "data-raw/qr.csv",   col_name = cols(Tipo_de_Estudio = col_factor(levels = c("Encuesta", "Verificacion")),     Clave_Jurisdiccion = col_factor(levels = as.character(c(2601, 2602, 2603, 2604, 2605,     2606))), Jurisdiccion = col_factor(levels = c("Hermosillo", "Caborca", "Cananea",     "Cajeme", "Navojoa", "San_Luis_Río_Colorado")), Clave_Municipio = col_factor(levels     = as.character(1:72)), Municipio = col_factor(), Clave_Localidad = col_factor(),     Localidad = col_factor(), Sector = col_factor(levels = as.character(1:2000)),     Fecha_de_Inicio = col_date(format = "%d/%m/%Y"),       Semana_Epidemiologica =     col_factor(levels = as.character(1:53)), Casas_Revisadas = col_double(),     Casas_Positivas = col_double(), Total_de_Recipientes_con_Agua = col_double(),     Total_de_Recipientes_Positivos = col_double()) )

title: clean raw data from a entomology study — clean_raw_data
text: df data.frame raw data processed function "load_raw_data". path_out string path cleaned data save. col_name selected variable names, deemed necessary analyze, previously selected function "load_raw_data".

title: clean raw data from a entomology study — clean_raw_data
text: Data.frame .csv file cleaned data correct format variables selected function "load_raw_data".

title: get_maps_stegomyia_indices — get_maps_stegomyia_indices
text: function generates maps three Stegomyia indices (Entomological Risk Indices) dataframe make funtion get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_geo_is. data frame containing information sectors corresponding indices.

title: get_maps_stegomyia_indices — get_maps_stegomyia_indices
get_maps_stegomyia_indices — get_maps_stegomyia_indices
text: df dataframe information processed function "get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_geo_is" "get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_star_date". m1 shapefile"ejercicio_sectores_hermosillo.shp" geographic information hermosillo city join dataframe information indices stegomyia m0 shapefile "ejercicio_sectores_hermosillo2.shp" limit sectors hermosillo city. shapefile use fution m1 give limits sectors hermosillo city print(maps$HI)  # Print map House Index   print(maps$CI)  # Print map Container Index   print(maps$BI)  # Print map Breteau Index

title: get_maps_stegomyia_indices — get_maps_stegomyia_indices
text: listmaps: list three ggplot objects representing maps different Stegomyia indices.

what: Get stegomyia indices by type of study and geographic variable — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_geo_is
title: Get stegomyia indices by type of study and geographic variable — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_geo_is
text: Stegomyia indices calculated sampling. data loaded function "load_raw_data" processed function "clean_raw_data", can select study type geographic variable using following formulas: - Container Index (CI): (number infected containers / total number containers) * 100. - House Index (HI): (number infected houses / total number houses) * 100. - Breteau Index (BI): (number positive containers / number houses explored) * 100.

title: Get stegomyia indices by type of study and geographic variable — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_geo_is
Get stegomyia indices by type of study and geographic variable — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_geo_is
text: df dataframe entomology information processed function "clean_raw_data". st type study selected, "Encuesta" "Verificacion". default, set "Verificacion". var geographic variable "Sector" used calculate stegomyia indices. path_out path data stegomyia indices status. default, set "data-raw/statusindicesector.csv".

title: Get stegomyia indices by type of study and geographic variable — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_geo_is
text: dataframe stegomyia indices status selection type study geographic variable.

title: Get stegomyia indices by type of study and geographic variable — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_geo_is
code: path_index_table = c(system.file("extdata",                                  "statusindicesector.csv",                                   package = "rStegomyia"                                   )                      )   df_stegomyia <- get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_geo_is(df_indx,                                                    st = "Verificacion",                                                    var ="400",                                                    path_out = path_index_table   )  head(df_stegomyia) #>   Sector       HI       CI       BI index_status_HI index_status_CI #> 1    400 9.803922 4.166667 9.803922      Emergencia          Alarma #>   index_status_BI #> 1      Emergencia

what: Get stegomyia indices by type of study and star date — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_star_date
title: Get stegomyia indices by type of study and star date — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_star_date
text: Stegomyia indices calculated sampling. data loaded function "load_rwa_data" changed type data function "clean_raw_data", select study type date variable using following  formulas:       - Container Index(CI): (number infected containers/total number       containers) * 100.       - House Index (HI): (number infected houses /total number       houses) * 100.       - Breteau Index (BI): (number positive containers/number houses       explored) * 100.

title: Get stegomyia indices by type of study and star date — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_star_date
Get stegomyia indices by type of study and star date — get_stegomyia_indices_by_type_of_study_and_star_date
text: df dataframe information processed function "clean_raw_data". st type study selected. default, set "Verificacion". date date used calculate stegomyia indices. default, set "2021/01/07".

what: Load raw data  of entomology study — load_raw_data
title: Load raw data  of entomology study — load_raw_data
text: Load_raw_data .txt file entomology study conducted platform "Vigilancia Entomológica y Control Integral del Vector." Choose variables used calculate entomological risk indices. Fix variable labels eliminate spaces column names, replacing underscores (_).one columns labeled Locality, Municipality, Jurisdiction selected, two columns created original one. names new columns key number variable name variable.

title: Load raw data  of entomology study — load_raw_data
code: load_raw_data(   path,   col_name = c("Tipo de Estudio", "Jurisdiccion", "Localidad", "Sector",     "Fecha de Inicio", "Semana Epidemiologica", "Casas Revisadas", "Casas Positivas",     "Total de Recipientes con Agua", "Total de Recipientes Positivos") )

title: Load raw data  of entomology study — load_raw_data
text: path string raw data path .txt file, activity "Estudios entomológicos en fase larval y pupal " platafor "Vigilancia Entomológica y Control Integral del Vector". col_name selected variable names, deemed necessary analyze.

title: Load raw data  of entomology study — load_raw_data
text: data frame selected format variable .txt file plataform "Vigilancia Entomológica y Control Integral del Vector" activity "Estudio Entomologico de fase larval y pupal".
